product: Dashboard visual indicators and chart improvements
tagline: New visual indicators for column names: Duplicate column names are now greyed out to indicate lack of support.
what_it_does: New visual indicators for column names: Duplicate column names are now greyed out to indicate lack of support. Fixed an issue with color mappings: Color mappings in the visualization editor now align with the renderer. Restricted character set: The name propertycustomer ref id in the serialized dashboard format is now restricted to alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores.
why_it_matters: Scale function: Choose Linear or Log (Symmetric).
